name: dropbox
description: Access, search, and manage files in your Dropbox storage

tools.name: List Files
tools.description: List files and folders in a Dropbox folder

tools.name: Get File
tools.description: Get file metadata and optionally download file content

tools.name: Upload File
tools.description: Upload or update a file in Dropbox

tools.name: Search Files
tools.description: Search for files and folders by name or content

tools.name: Get Account Info
tools.description: Get current user account information and storage usage

prompts.title: Find my documents
prompts.prompt: Search my Dropbox for specific documents or files by name or content.

prompts.title: Organize files
prompts.prompt: Help me organize and manage files in my Dropbox, including moving, copying, or cleaning up duplicates.

prompts.title: Backup a file
prompts.prompt: Upload and backup a file to my Dropbox storage.

prompts.title: Check storage
prompts.prompt: Check my Dropbox storage usage and available space.
